---
title: "Assessing the energy implications of replacing car trips with bicycle trips in Sheffield, UK"
description: "Robin Lovelace, S. B. M. B M Beck, M. Watson, and A. Wild (2011). Assessing the energy implications of replacing car trips with bicycle trips in Sheffield, UK. *Energy Policy*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.enpol.2011.01.051"
date: "2011-02-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_assessing_2011"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Energy Policy"
doi: "10.1016/j.enpol.2011.01.051"
publication-url: "http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0301421511000620"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "S. B. M. B M Beck"
  - "M. Watson"
  - "A. Wild"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Energy Policy
**Year:** 2011

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.enpol.2011.01.051) [Publisher Link](http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0301421511000620) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace, S. B. M. B M Beck, M. Watson, and A. Wild (2011). Assessing the energy implications of replacing car trips with bicycle trips in Sheffield, UK. *Energy Policy*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.enpol.2011.01.051

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_assessing_2011,
  title = {Assessing the Energy Implications of Replacing Car Trips with Bicycle Trips in {{Sheffield}}, {{UK}}},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Beck, S.B.M. B M and Watson, M. and Wild, A.},
  date = {2011-02},
  journaltitle = {Energy Policy},
  volume = {39},
  number = {4},
  pages = {2075--2087},
  issn = {03014215},
  doi = {10.1016/j.enpol.2011.01.051},
  url = {http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S0301421511000620},
  keywords = {Modal shift,Replacement ratio},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/L2I4EZTU/1-s2.0-S0301421511000620-main.pdf}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
